files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+function byId<T extends HTMLElement>(id: string): T {
+  const el = document.getElementById(id);
+  if (!el) throw new Error(`Missing #${id}`);
+  return el as T;
+}
+
+export function getOptionsElements() {
+  const tabsRoot = byId<HTMLDivElement>("tabs");
+
+  return {
+    formEl: byId<HTMLFormElement>("form"),
+    statusEl: byId<HTMLSpanElement>("status"),
+    tokenEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("token"),
+    tokenCopyBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("tokenCopy"),
+    modelPresetEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("modelPreset"),
+    modelCustomEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("modelCustom"),
+    languagePresetEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("languagePreset"),
+    languageCustomEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("languageCustom"),
+    promptOverrideEl: byId<HTMLTextAreaElement>("promptOverride"),
+    autoToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("autoToggle"),
+    maxCharsEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("maxChars"),
+    hoverPromptEl: byId<HTMLTextAreaElement>("hoverPrompt"),
+    hoverPromptResetBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("hoverPromptReset"),
+    chatToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("chatToggle"),
+    automationToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("automationToggle"),
+    automationPermissionsBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("automationPermissions"),
+    userScriptsNoticeEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("userScriptsNotice"),
+    skillsExportBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("skillsExport"),
+    skillsImportBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("skillsImport"),
+    skillsSearchEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("skillsSearch"),
+    skillsListEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("skillsList"),
+    skillsEmptyEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("skillsEmpty"),
+    skillsConflictsEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("skillsImportConflicts"),
+    hoverSummariesToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("hoverSummariesToggle"),
+    summaryTimestampsToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("summaryTimestampsToggle"),
+    slidesParallelToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("slidesParallelToggle"),
+    slidesOcrToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("slidesOcrToggle"),
+    extendedLoggingToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("extendedLoggingToggle"),
+    autoCliFallbackToggleRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("autoCliFallbackToggle"),
+    autoCliOrderEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("autoCliOrder"),
+    requestModeEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("requestMode"),
+    firecrawlModeEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("firecrawlMode"),
+    markdownModeEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("markdownMode"),
+    preprocessModeEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("preprocessMode"),
+    youtubeModeEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("youtubeMode"),
+    transcriberEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("transcriber"),
+    timeoutEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("timeout"),
+    retriesEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("retries"),
+    maxOutputTokensEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("maxOutputTokens"),
+    pickersRoot: byId<HTMLDivElement>("pickersRoot"),
+    fontFamilyEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("fontFamily"),
+    fontSizeEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("fontSize"),
+    buildInfoEl: document.getElementById("buildInfo"),
+    daemonStatusEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("daemonStatus"),
+    logsSourceEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("logsSource"),
+    logsTailEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("logsTail"),
+    logsRefreshBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("logsRefresh"),
+    logsAutoEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("logsAuto"),
+    logsOutputEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("logsOutput"),
+    logsRawEl: byId<HTMLPreElement>("logsRaw"),
+    logsTableEl: byId<HTMLTableElement>("logsTable"),
+    logsParsedEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("logsParsed"),
+    logsMetaEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("logsMeta"),
+    processesRefreshBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("processesRefresh"),
+    processesAutoEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("processesAuto"),
+    processesShowCompletedEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("processesShowCompleted"),
+    processesLimitEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("processesLimit"),
+    processesStreamEl: byId<HTMLSelectElement>("processesStream"),
+    processesTailEl: byId<HTMLInputElement>("processesTail"),
+    processesMetaEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("processesMeta"),
+    processesTableEl: byId<HTMLTableElement>("processesTable"),
+    processesLogsTitleEl: byId<HTMLDivElement>("processesLogsTitle"),
+    processesLogsCopyBtn: byId<HTMLButtonElement>("processesLogsCopy"),
+    processesLogsOutputEl: byId<HTMLPreElement>("processesLogsOutput"),
+    tabsRoot,
+    tabButtons: Array.from(tabsRoot.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>("[data-tab]")),
+    tabPanels: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>("[data-tab-panel]")),
+    logsLevelInputs: Array.from(
+      document.querySelectorAll<HTMLInputElement>("input[data-log-level]"),
+    ),
+  };
+}
